scenario: Plaintext client connects when TLS is required
expected_outcome: Connection refused with engine-visible deny vector

scenario: Client certificate signed by wrong CA
expected_outcome: Authentication denied and no session or transaction is created

scenario: Expired client certificate
expected_outcome: Authentication denied with stable diagnostic

scenario: Channel binding mismatch after TLS handshake
expected_outcome: Authentication denied by engine authority

scenario: DDL creates catalog rows then transaction rolls back
expected_outcome: No catalog generation is published and provisional descriptors disappear

scenario: Duplicate name under same parent language and class
expected_outcome: Name resolver emits conflict diagnostic and no duplicate authority row is written

scenario: Dependency edge points to missing target UUID
expected_outcome: DDL fails with dependency diagnostic

scenario: Unauthorized user queries hidden catalog object projection
expected_outcome: Projection hides row without leaking existence

scenario: Synonym name conflicts with existing object under same parent and language
expected_outcome: DDL fails before synonym descriptor or resolver row is published

scenario: Synonym chain exceeds five hops
expected_outcome: Resolution fails with stable depth diagnostic and no target binding

scenario: Synonym chain contains a cycle
expected_outcome: Resolution fails with stable cycle diagnostic and no target binding

scenario: Create child object through schema synonym path
expected_outcome: Child is parented to the final target schema UUID not the synonym object UUID

scenario: NOT NULL violation during insert
expected_outcome: Statement fails and no visible row version is published

scenario: Unique key conflict under concurrent transaction
expected_outcome: Conflict is detected through backing index and MGA visibility

scenario: Foreign key target rolled back before commit
expected_outcome: Referential check fails or defers according to constraint timing

scenario: Savepoint rollback after deferred constraint violation
expected_outcome: Savepoint restores constraint workset and diagnostic state

scenario: Crash after dirty manifest write before checkpoint publication
expected_outcome: Recovery ignores or quarantines unproven manifest and remains idempotent

scenario: Dirty manifest checksum mismatch
expected_outcome: Recovery falls back to bounded scan or fail-closed quarantine

scenario: Backup manifest missing filespace UUID
expected_outcome: Restore refused with coverage diagnostic

scenario: Delta stream has missing segment
expected_outcome: Apply refused with gap classification

scenario: PITR target outside coverage range
expected_outcome: Restore refused with target coverage diagnostic

scenario: Allocation map references non-durable page generation
expected_outcome: Startup recovery refuses or repairs before visibility
